packagePurpose: Realistic visual assets and source references for BCI Explorer website animation redesign.
usageRule: Use these images as realistic references/backgrounds. Add animated overlays for labels, signal flow, device movement, brain region highlights, and cell-response effects.

assets.licenseNote: Wikimedia Commons; derived from US Patent #5,215,088; generally public domain for US patent contents; verify final legal status for production.
assets.attribution: Richard A. Normann, US Patent #5,215,088, via Wikimedia Commons

assets.licenseNote: Public domain / NIH source as marked on Wikimedia Commons; note the Wikimedia page advises confirming federal-government origin.
